metadata.description: AKA Security tools for coding agents

plugins.name: flightcrew
plugins.description: An independent multi-model review crew for coding agents: two blind cross-family reads plus an independent judge that filters false positives — report-only.

plugins.name: claude-tools
plugins.description: The security defaults Claude Code doesn't ship with: guard hooks (command-guard, leak-guard) that block pipe-to-shell and catch secrets before they leave. The full kit installs via shell/npm/Homebrew; this is the guard-hooks plugin.
